title: cyperus unioloides
intro: Cyperus unioloides, also known as Tithonia or Chrysanthemum weed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus unioloides include treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as skin problems and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
